call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Financial Solutions. I see you filled out a form online regarding our Signature Credit Card. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 15.99%. It has some fantastic rewards, like 2% cashback on all purchases. Does that sound interesting? 
Eleanor: Hmm, maybe. What's the annual fee? 
Agent: It's $99 a year, but honestly, with the cashback, most customers more than make that back. We also have travel insurance and purchase protection. 
Eleanor: Travel insurance? That's good. I do travel a bit. 
Agent: Exactly! And it's all bundled in. We can get you approved in just a few minutes. Just need to confirm a few details. Your income is around $6500 a month, correct? 
Eleanor: Yes, that's right. 
Agent: Perfect. And you're currently employed? 
Eleanor: Yes. 
Agent: Wonderful. Okay, Eleanor, I'm processing your application now... and… you're approved! We'll send over the card in 7-10 business days. 
Eleanor: Oh, great! That's… that's really good. 
Agent: Fantastic! Is there anything else I can help you with today?

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Financial Solutions. We're offering a pre-approved Personal Loan. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't ask for this. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… we acquired your information through a marketing partner. We're offering a $10,000 Personal Loan at 18.5%. 
Robert: 18.5?! That's highway robbery! I already have a loan with my bank. 
Agent: Well, sir, we can potentially offer a lower rate if we look at your credit profile. 
Robert: I don't need to look at anything. I'm perfectly happy with my bank. And frankly, I don't appreciate being bothered. 
Agent: Okay, sir. I understand. I apologize for the inconvenience. 
Robert: Just take my number off your list. 
Agent: Certainly, sir. Have a good day.

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Financial Solutions. I'm calling about our Signature Credit Card. I understand you were referred by a partner. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, my friend Sarah mentioned it. 
Agent: Great! We're pre-approving you for an $8,000 Signature Credit Card at 14.99%. It's a really popular card with excellent rewards. 
Jessica: What kind of rewards? 
Agent: We have 3% cashback on dining and travel, 2% on groceries, and 1% on everything else. Plus, a sign-up bonus of $200 after you spend $1000 in the first three months. 
Jessica: That sounds pretty good, actually. I eat out a lot. 
Agent: Perfect! It's designed for people like you. We also offer zero liability protection and fraud monitoring. 
Jessica: Okay. What's the credit limit like? 
Agent: Your initial credit limit would be $8,000, and it can be increased based on your spending and payment history. 
Jessica: Hmm. I'm a little busy right now. Could you send me some information by email? 
Agent: Absolutely! I'll send over a brochure with all the details. My email is david.financialsolutions@email.com. 
Jessica: Great, thanks! 
Agent: You're welcome, Jessica. Have a great day!

Agent: Hello, Mr. Davis? This is Lisa from Financial Solutions. I see you inquired about a Personal Loan online. 
Michael: (Sighs) You guys called me yesterday! I told the other person I wasn't interested. 
Agent: I apologize for the repeated call, sir. I assure you, I'll be brief. We're pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 16.5%. 
Michael: 16.5?! Are you kidding me? That's ridiculous! I have a good income. 
Agent: Sir, the rate is based on your credit score and income verification. However, we can explore options to potentially lower it. 
Michael: Look, I need this loan for a business investment. I need a better rate. I'm self-employed, so my credit isn't perfect, but I make good money. 
Agent: I understand. Let me see what I can do. (Typing sounds) Okay, Mr. Davis, I can offer you a slightly reduced rate of 16.25% if you agree to automatic payments. 
Michael: 16.25% is still high. Can you go any lower? 
Agent: That's the best I can do at this time, sir. We also have flexible repayment terms, ranging from 24 to 60 months. 
Michael: Hmm… 60 months? Okay, let's say I agree to the 16.25% and the 60-month term. What are the monthly payments? 
Agent: One moment… The monthly payment would be approximately $332. 
Michael: Alright. Fine. Let's do it. But if I have any issues, I'm calling back and speaking to your manager. 
Agent: Excellent! I'm processing your application now. You'll receive a confirmation email shortly.

Agent: Hello, Mrs. Green? This is Kevin calling from Financial Solutions. We're offering a pre-approved Personal Loan. 
Patricia: (Confused) A what now? Speak up, dear. 
Agent: A Personal Loan, ma'am. We can offer you $2,000 at 22.99%. 
Patricia: 22… what was that number again? I didn't quite catch it. 
Agent: 22.99%, ma'am. It's a very simple process. 
Patricia: Oh, I don't know about all this. It sounds… complicated. I just want to be left alone. (Click)
